title: albizia divaricata
intro: Albizia divaricata, also known as Simal or Simal Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Albizia divaricata include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and cough. Herbal preparations of Albizia divaricata are typically made into decoctions, infusions, or powders, and are used to treat a range of health conditions.
